MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Meyer, Esq. (415-956-8400) of Losch & Ehrlich for Plaintiff (Appears late after 9:30 am)
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF VINCENZO DI FUCCIA'S MOTION FOR AMENDMENT OF JUDGMENT is GRANTED. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order and Amended Judgment are signed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)
